name: Atrophy Bomb (Major)
description:
Activate 1 Strike

Atrophy bombs contain powerful chemicals developed by Urgathoan alchemists that sap a living creature's strength and drain their energy. The bomb deals 4d4 persistent void damage and 4 void splash damage, and the target is Enfeebled 2 until the start of your next turn. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls with this bomb.
